description_long: This skateboard features a standard double-kick deck with a black top surface adorned by a green, angular star-shaped logo at its center. The underside of the deck is decorated with a vibrant, cartoonish graphic depicting a green alien character in a white outfit, set against a dynamic, colorful background with splashes of orange, yellow, and blue. The skateboard is equipped with four blue polyurethane wheels and black standard trucks, which are securely mounted to the deck. The grip tape on the top appears solid black except for the central logo, providing traction for the rider. The deck is likely constructed from layered maple wood, a common material for durability and flexibility. This skateboard is designed for street or park use, combining both functional and aesthetic elements typical of urban sports equipment.
description: A visually striking skateboard with a black deck, green star logo on top, and a colorful alien graphic on the underside, equipped with blue wheels and black trucks.
description_view_0: Top view showing a solid black grip tape with a green star logo at the center.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the deck's concave shape, blue wheels, and black trucks.
description_view_2: Bottom view displaying a vibrant alien graphic with colorful background and visible blue wheels.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the deck's curvature and blue wheels.
attribute_brand_logo: A green, angular star-shaped logo is present at the center of the black grip tape on the top of the deck; no text is visible.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: The underside features a colorful, cartoon-style graphic of a green alien in a white outfit with sunglasses, tongue out, set against a dynamic, splattered background of orange, yellow, blue, and black.
attribute_wheel_type: Classic street wheels, medium size, solid blue color, no visible text or logos.
attribute_truck_style: Standard black trucks with a traditional kingpin mounting, no visible branding or unique features.
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: Solid black grip tape with a central green star logo; no additional patterns or graphics.
